{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220155427F024B4AF6927EF8337D"}"},"total":62},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7530289121540227902","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星好评，写的很好，文笔很不错，虽然雷拆CP，但是文笔大于一切，文笔好能压过一切雷点，太太加油，虽然但是能不能加更啊，压根不够看啊，现在，我要做一件不道德的事，就是吃完饭打厨子，强烈谴责太太你一章两千字，万字肥章多来点啊[哭][哭][哭][哭][哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753286608,"group_id":"7509761300126239769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个梦到哪写哪的人，问就是没有逻辑⊙-⊙","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/aefI6sYUT+WNLsn1avHNM=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e8aba83d41a64cda8316e6a7e3a91a97~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703789&x-signature=wGdbSrTckAIfQf8pNgPAQMWlf0k%3D","user_id":"342700509373431","user_name":"这有一只聪明鼠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"342700509373431","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7509761300126239769","book_info":{"abstract":"江冕的生活陷入一场荒诞的轮回。每一次醒来，他就会发现自己已身处一部截然不同的经典影视剧中，身份更是令人绝望——永远是站在主角对立面的反派，结局注定惨淡收场。
他被迫披上反派的外衣，在熟悉的剧情里挣扎求生。
然而，命运的捉弄远不止于此。敌对的立场，更是致命的吸引。在阴谋与背叛的漩涡里，在杀意与暧昧交织的瞬间，情愫悄然滋长。
